Terms of Service

Last updated: March 12, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Tool Box Nova, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" dict "SlotID" "terms-top" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled }}

2. Permitted Use

Tool Box Nova tools are intended for legal privacy protection, development testing, and educational purposes. You agree NOT to:

  • Use tools for fraud, identity theft, or illegal activities
  • Abuse the proxy service to access illegal content
  • Attempt to circumvent security measures
  • Use automated scripts to overload our services

3. Disclaimer of Warranties

Tool Box Nova is provided "as is" without any warranties. We do not guarantee uptime, accuracy of generated data, or availability of third-party services.

4. Limitation of Liability

Tool Box Nova shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our tools.

5. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

6. Contact

Questions about these terms? Contact us.
